name: Proem Acquisition Corp. I
business: Proem Acquisition Corp I is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands in July 2025 for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any business combination target.

exposures.sentence: Initially, we intend to focus on targeting secular growth industries such as AI, blockchain, SaaS, data infrastructure, and cybersecurity.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: The global artificial intelligence market is projected to reach over $1.8T by 2030, representing a CAGR of roughly 36% from 2025 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: For example, according to a Grand View Research report, the size of the global artificial intelligence market is projected to reach over $1.8T by 2030, representing a CAGR of roughly 36% from 2025 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The blockchain market is projected to reach up to $1.4T by 2030, representing a 90% CAGR from 2025 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the same report, the blockchain market is expected to demonstrate meaningful growth, projected to reach up to $1.4T by 2030, representing a 90% CAGR from 2025 to 2030.
